{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "At Genesis Group, we&#39;ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Officer serves as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and callers, ensuring a professional and welcoming experience while providing administrative support to maintain smooth office operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet visitors, clients, and guests warmly; direct them appropriately and maintain visitor logs.
	Answer, screen, and direct phone calls, emails, and inquiries promptly and professionally.
	Manage appointment scheduling, calendars, and meeting room bookings for staff.
	Handle incoming and outgoing mail, packages, and deliveries efficiently.
	Perform administrative tasks such as data entry, filing, photocopying, and office supply monitoring.
	Maintain a tidy and organized front desk area; report maintenance issues promptly.
	Assist with basic client support, event coordination, and other ad-hoc duties as needed.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree or HND in any related field (NYSC discharge certificate required).
	1-2 years of experience in a front desk, receptionist, or customer service role, preferably in hospitality or services.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a professional demeanor.
	Proficiency in MS Office Suite, Google Workspace, and basic office equipment (printers, scanners).
	Strong organizational skills, multitasking ability, and attention to detail.
	Friendly, approachable personality with a customer-service focus.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to:&nbsp;vacancies@genesisgroupng.com&nbsp;using &quot;Front Desk Officer Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-09",

  },

Front Desk Officer Job at Genesis Group




        
    

        
        At Genesis Group, we've been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Front Desk Officer serves as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and callers, ensuring a professional and welcoming experience while providing administrative support to maintain smooth office operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet visitors, clients, and guests warmly; direct them appropriately and maintain visitor logs.
	Answer, screen, and direct phone calls, emails, and inquiries promptly and professionally.
	Manage appointment scheduling, calendars, and meeting room bookings for staff.
	Handle incoming and outgoing mail, packages, and deliveries efficiently.
	Perform administrative tasks such as data entry, filing, photocopying, and office supply monitoring.
	Maintain a tidy and organized front desk area; report maintenance issues promptly.
	Assist with basic client support, event coordination, and other ad-hoc duties as needed.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree or HND in any related field (NYSC discharge certificate required).
	1-2 years of experience in a front desk, receptionist, or customer service role, preferably in hospitality or services.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a professional demeanor.
	Proficiency in MS Office Suite, Google Workspace, and basic office equipment (printers, scanners).
	Strong organizational skills, multitasking ability, and attention to detail.
	Friendly, approachable personality with a customer-service focus.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "Front Desk Officer Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "De-Ark Apartment and Suite -&nbsp;Our bar is a customer-focused hospitality business committed to providing a relaxed, safe, and enjoyable environment for patrons. We offer a wide selection of quality beverages and excellent service, while maintaining high standards of professionalism, accountability, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Accountant will be responsible for managing the financial records of the bar, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, stock control, revenue reconciliation, and compliance with financial and tax regulations.
	The role supports management by providing timely financial reports and controlling costs.


Key Responsibilities


	Record daily sales, expenses, and cash transactions.
	Reconcile daily bar sales with POS and cash collections.
	Monitor and control inventory (drinks, consumables, bar supplies).
	Prepare weekly and monthly financial reports.
	Manage payroll and staff wages (if applicable).
	Track accounts payable and receivable.
	Ensure proper documentation of invoices and receipts.
	Assist with budgeting and cost control.
	Ensure compliance with tax obligations (VAT, PAYE, etc.).
	Liaise with auditors, tax consultants, and regulators when required.


Requirements
Required Skills:


	Strong bookkeeping and accounting skills.
	Knowledge of POS systems and cash management.
	Attention to detail and high level of accuracy.
	Good analytical and reporting skills.
	Integrity and confidentiality.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Salary
N50,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;ukuwa2003@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more inquiries, contact&nbsp;07066980808&nbsp;on WhatApp.",

Accountant Job at De-Ark Apartment and Suite




        
    

        
        De-Ark Apartment and Suite - Our bar is a customer-focused hospitality business committed to providing a relaxed, safe, and enjoyable environment for patrons. We offer a wide selection of quality beverages and excellent service, while maintaining high standards of professionalism, accountability, and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Accountant will be responsible for managing the financial records of the bar, ensuring accurate bookkeeping, stock control, revenue reconciliation, and compliance with financial and tax regulations.
	The role supports management by providing timely financial reports and controlling costs.


Key Responsibilities


	Record daily sales, expenses, and cash transactions.
	Reconcile daily bar sales with POS and cash collections.
	Monitor and control inventory (drinks, consumables, bar supplies).
	Prepare weekly and monthly financial reports.
	Manage payroll and staff wages (if applicable).
	Track accounts payable and receivable.
	Ensure proper documentation of invoices and receipts.
	Assist with budgeting and cost control.
	Ensure compliance with tax obligations (VAT, PAYE, etc.).
	Liaise with auditors, tax consultants, and regulators when required.


Requirements
Required Skills:


	Strong bookkeeping and accounting skills.
	Knowledge of POS systems and cash management.
	Attention to detail and high level of accuracy.
	Good analytical and reporting skills.
	Integrity and confidentiality.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Salary
N50,000 - N100,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more inquiries, contact 07066980808 on WhatApp.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	IDA Beauty is a luxury, halal-certified, vegan, and cruelty-free beauty brand committed to inclusivity, sustainability, and empowering confidence from the inside out.
	As we continue to expand our retail and community presence, we are seeking passionate and result-driven Field Marketers to represent our brand on the ground.

Field Marketer Job at IDA Beauty




        
    

        
        IDA Beauty™ is more than just a makeup store; we are a beauty community. Our journey began with a passion for makeup and a dream to help everyone feel their best. With years of experience in the beauty industry, specialize in three different categories: face, lips, and eyes cosmetics, with a commitment to premium quality and durability, we have quickly become a standout in the beauty industry leading E-commerce.

Our range of luxury premium-quality formulations makeup product made from natural organic ingredients, biodegradable, vegan beauty, eco friendly, cruelty free, gluten, sulfates, and halal certification. We curate products that not only enhance your features but also empower individuals to express themselves through makeup.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Marketer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract / Part-Time

Job Summary


	IDA Beauty is a luxury, halal-certified, vegan, and cruelty-free beauty brand committed to inclusivity, sustainability, and empowering confidence from the inside out.
	As we continue to expand our retail and community presence, we are seeking passionate and result-driven Field Marketers to represent our brand on the ground.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell IDA Beauty products across assigned locations (retail outlets, events, pop-ups, and partner stores)
	Educate customers on product benefits, ingredients, and brand values (halal-certified, vegan, cruelty-free, eco-friendly)
	Drive product awareness and increase sales through direct engagement and demonstrations
	Identify new sales opportunities and build strong relationships with retailers and customers
	Gather market feedback, competitor insights, and customer preferences
	Meet assigned sales targets and submit daily/weekly activity reports
	Represent the brand professionally and uphold IDA Beauty’s values at all times


Requirements


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	1–2 years of experience in field marketing, sales, or beauty retail (beauty industry experience is an advantage)
	Strong communication and persuasion skills
	Confident in product demonstrations and customer engagement
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to work independently
	Good knowledge of Lagos market terrain


Key Competencies:


	Sales and negotiation skills
	Customer relationship management
	Brand representation excellence
	Confidence and professionalism
	Results-oriented mindset.


Salary
N150,000  monthly with a 5% commission on sales turnover.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Field Marketer” as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager",
  "description": "Sevic Recruit is a leading recruitment agency dedicated to connecting top talent with exceptional career opportunities with a proven track record of delivering exceptional talent solutions.Our mission is to foster lasting partnerships fostering a culture of trust, integrity, and mutual success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Airport Road, Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Project Manager will be responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and completing projects within scope, budget, and schedule.
	The role includes coordinating multidisciplinary teams, managing resources, tracking progress, resolving issues, and ensuring that project deliverables meet quality and client expectations.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Project Management, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 10 years of relevant experience in project management, preferably in construction, architecture, or engineering projects.
	Strong knowledge of project planning, budgeting, scheduling, risk management, and reporting.
	Proficiency in project management tools such as MS Project, Primavera, Excel, or similar software.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and coordinate cross-functional teams.
	PMP, PRINCE2, or other professional certification is an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;sevicrecruit@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Project Manager Job at Sevic Recruit




        
    

        
        Sevic Recruit is a leading recruitment agency dedicated to connecting top talent with exceptional career opportunities with a proven track record of delivering exceptional talent solutions.Our mission is to foster lasting partnerships fostering a culture of trust, integrity, and mutual success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager
Job Location: Airport Road, Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Project Manager will be responsible for planning, executing, monitoring, and completing projects within scope, budget, and schedule.
	The role includes coordinating multidisciplinary teams, managing resources, tracking progress, resolving issues, and ensuring that project deliverables meet quality and client expectations.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Project Management, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 10 years of relevant experience in project management, preferably in construction, architecture, or engineering projects.
	Strong knowledge of project planning, budgeting, scheduling, risk management, and reporting.
	Proficiency in project management tools such as MS Project, Primavera, Excel, or similar software.
	Excellent leadership, communication, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and coordinate cross-functional teams.
	PMP, PRINCE2, or other professional certification is an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Prixair comprises of Prixair Hotels, Prixair Catering, Prixair Properties, Prixair Studio and Flames Restaurant. We are the leading hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels to extended-stay suites. Prixair group offers business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Prixair group is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Customer Service:&nbsp;Greet customers, take orders clearly, and answer questions about menu items (e.g., shawarma wraps, toppings, drinks).
	Order Processing:&nbsp;Input orders into the POS system accurately and communicate them to kitchen staff.
	Handling Payments:&nbsp;Accept cash, card, or mobile payments, give correct change, and issue receipts.
	Menu Knowledge:&nbsp;Understand ingredients, combo options, pricing, and promotions to assist customers effectively.
	Maintaining Cleanliness:&nbsp;Keep the cashier area, counter, and dining area clean and organized.
	Order Coordination:&nbsp;Call out completed orders and ensure customers receive the correct items.
	Upselling:&nbsp;Suggest add-ons like drinks, fries, or extra toppings to increase sales.
	Stock Monitoring:&nbsp;Notify management when items like wraps, drinks, or packaging are running low.
	Daily Cash Handling:&nbsp;Balance the cash register at the start and end of shifts.


Skills &amp; Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Basic math skills for handling cash
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Attention to detail
	Friendly and professional attitude
	Previous cashier or food service experience (optional but helpful)


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;Prixairhumanresources@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Cashier Job at Prixair




        
    

        
        Prixair comprises of Prixair Hotels, Prixair Catering, Prixair Properties, Prixair Studio and Flames Restaurant. We are the leading hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels to extended-stay suites. Prixair group offers business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Prixair group is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Customer Service: Greet customers, take orders clearly, and answer questions about menu items (e.g., shawarma wraps, toppings, drinks).
	Order Processing: Input orders into the POS system accurately and communicate them to kitchen staff.
	Handling Payments: Accept cash, card, or mobile payments, give correct change, and issue receipts.
	Menu Knowledge: Understand ingredients, combo options, pricing, and promotions to assist customers effectively.
	Maintaining Cleanliness: Keep the cashier area, counter, and dining area clean and organized.
	Order Coordination: Call out completed orders and ensure customers receive the correct items.
	Upselling: Suggest add-ons like drinks, fries, or extra toppings to increase sales.
	Stock Monitoring: Notify management when items like wraps, drinks, or packaging are running low.
	Daily Cash Handling: Balance the cash register at the start and end of shifts.


Skills & Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Basic math skills for handling cash
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Attention to detail
	Friendly and professional attitude
	Previous cashier or food service experience (optional but helpful)


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
